sample-project-phase1/pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade the Spring Boot parent version to 3.3.13 to align with the Java 17 migration and Spring Boot 3 requirements.
sample-project-phase1/pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x requires Java 17 as a baseline; using Spring Boot 2.x with Java 17 may lead to compatibility issues or missed features, and the migration recipe explicitly targets Spring Boot 3.

sample-project-phase1/pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property to 17 to target the new JDK baseline.
sample-project-phase1/pom.xml.why_exists: The build will fail or produce incorrect bytecode if the source/target compatibility remains at 11 while the project is intended for Java 17.

sample-project-phase1/pom.xml.general_idea: Replace the deprecated MySQL connector artifact with the new group ID and artifact ID.
sample-project-phase1/pom.xml.why_exists: The old artifact 'mysql:mysql-connector-java' is deprecated and may not be available or compatible with newer Spring Boot 3 dependencies; the new artifact 'com.mysql:mysql-connector-j' is the required replacement.

sample-project-phase1/src/main/java/es/c.general_idea: Migrate servlet API import from javax to jakarta namespace to comply with Jakarta EE 9+ requirements in Spring Boot 3.
sample-project-phase1/src/main/java/es/c.why_exists: Compile error: package javax.servlet.http does not exist in Jakarta EE 9+ environments required by Spring Boot 3.

sample-project-phase1/src/main/java/es/c.general_idea: Migrate JPA annotations from javax.persistence to jakarta.persistence to comply with Jakarta EE 9+ namespace requirements in Spring Boot 3.
sample-project-phase1/src/main/java/es/c.why_exists: Import statement 'javax.persistence' is not found; classes like Entity, Id, etc. do not exist in the javax namespace in Jakarta EE 9+, causing compilation errors.

sample-project-phase1/src/main/java/es/c.general_idea: Migrate JPA annotations from javax.persistence to jakarta.persistence package.
sample-project-phase1/src/main/java/es/c.why_exists: javax.persistence package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+ (Spring Boot 3), causing compile errors for missing classes.

sample-project-phase1/src/main/java/es/c.general_idea: Migrate JPA annotations from javax.persistence to jakarta.persistence package.
sample-project-phase1/src/main/java/es/c.why_exists: javax.persistence package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+ (Spring Boot 3), causing compile errors for missing classes.

sample-project-phase1/src/main/java/es/c.why_exists: javax.persistence package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+ (Spring Boot 3), causing compile errors for missing classes.

sample-project-phase1/src/main/java/es/c.why_exists: javax.persistence package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+ (Spring Boot 3), causing compile errors for missing classes.

sample-project-phase1/src/main/java/es/c.why_exists: javax.persistence package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+ (Spring Boot 3), causing compile errors for missing classes.

sample-project-phase1/src/main/java/es/c.why_exists: javax.persistence package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+ (Spring Boot 3), causing compile errors for missing classes.

sample-project-phase1/src/main/java/es/c.general_idea: Migrate servlet API imports from javax to jakarta namespace to comply with Jakarta EE 9+ requirements in Spring Boot 3.
sample-project-phase1/src/main/java/es/c.why_exists: Compilation error: package javax.servlet does not exist in Java 17/Spring Boot 3 environment which uses Jakarta EE.

sample-project-phase1/src/main/java/es/c.general_idea: Replace deprecated antMatchers with requestMatchers in Spring Security HTTP configuration.
sample-project-phase1/src/main/java/es/c.why_exists: antMatchers is deprecated in Spring Security 5.7+ and removed in Spring Security 6 (Spring Boot 3), causing compilation errors or runtime failures if not replaced.

sample-project-phase1/src/main/java/es/c.general_idea: Migrate formLogin configuration from chained builder to lambda DSL.
sample-project-phase1/src/main/java/es/c.why_exists: The old chained formLogin() API is deprecated/removed in Spring Security 6; the new API requires a lambda consumer to configure the FormLoginConfigurer.

sample-project-phase1/src/main/java/es/c.general_idea: Migrate logout configuration from chained builder to lambda DSL.
sample-project-phase1/src/main/java/es/c.why_exists: The old chained logout() API is deprecated/removed in Spring Security 6; the new API requires a lambda consumer to configure the LogoutConfigurer.

sample-project-phase1/src/main/java/es/c.general_idea: Migrate the PostConstruct annotation import from the javax package to the jakarta package to align with Jakarta EE 9+ standards required by Spring Boot 3.
sample-project-phase1/src/main/java/es/c.why_exists: The javax.annotation package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+ and Spring Boot 3; using the old import causes a compile error (cannot find symbol) or runtime NoClassDefFoundError.
